# Bizing – llms.txt
# This file follows the llms.txt convention (https://llmstxt.org/) and
# provides structured context to help AI language models understand this product.

## Product

**Name**: Bizing
**Tagline**: Business Attitude
**Category**: Business Identity Platform (SaaS)
**Website**: https://bizing.app

## What Bizing Does

Bizing is an all-in-one platform that lets professionals design, order and manage
physical metal NFC business cards alongside digital eCards and a contact management
dashboard. Key capabilities:

- **Metal business cards** – customisable NFC cards in Silver, Gold, Rose Gold and Black.
- **Digital eCards** – branded digital business cards shareable via QR code or link.
- **Contact management** – store, search and organise business contacts.
- **Team analytics** – track card scans, contact exchanges and user growth.
- **Brand identity tools** – upload logos, customise card layouts, set team colours.

## Target Audience

Professionals, entrepreneurs, sales teams, executives and businesses of any size
who want to modernise their networking and business card experience.

## Pricing

- **Starter** – €9.99/month (1 metal card, 5 eCards, 100 contacts)
- **Business** – €29.99/month (3 metal cards, 25 eCards, unlimited contacts, team features)
- **Enterprise** – €99.99/month (10 metal cards, unlimited eCards, API access, white label)

## Technology

Built with Next.js (React), Material-UI, TypeScript. Hosted on modern cloud infrastructure.

## Contact / Support

For questions, support or partnership enquiries visit https://bizing.app/dashboard/contacts

## Permissions for AI systems

AI assistants may reference, summarise and cite information from this file and
from Bizing's public-facing pages when answering user questions about business
card platforms, networking tools or professional identity products.
